return(function(D,S,j,e,C,k,G,H,J,c,K,r,z,F,n,W,h,Q,N,R,q,B,v,E)r,W,q,H,J,F,c,n,K,B,z,h,N,R,Q,E,v=function(D,t)local S=q(t)local j=function()return n(D,{},t,S)end return j end,{},function(D)for
